content.en:
The sacred mountain of life.

A Guardian Rank-level powerhouse came here under the leadership of a Saint Ancestor-level, and there were about a hundred Guardian Rank-level who had the quota to enter the Life Divine Mountain this time.

Ye Tian was also among them, and when he came here, he immediately felt that the attraction in the underworld had strengthened a lot, as if urging him to enter the Life Divine Mountain.

Ye Tian didn't have an impulse, but held back.

At this time, there must be no chaos, otherwise it will be completely troublesome.

He was able to use his copying talent to sense the number of powerhouses in the Life Divine Mountain, two Old Ancestors, six Great Saint Ancestors, and hundreds of Saint Ancestors, this was the power to protect the Life Divine Mountain.

If you add the hundreds of Saint Ancestor level powerhouses who escorted the escort team-level powerhouses, the number of powerhouses is even higher.

Such a force is too strong, even if Ye Tian's strength is ten times stronger, he will not be able to compete with the powerhouses here.

Since the Life Divine Mountain is so important, every Guardian Rank needs to go through strict scrutiny, after all, if something goes wrong, it will be difficult for the entire Life Green Clan to continue to be strong.

Ye Tian was also a little nervous, for fear that the Dao-level natal talent reincarnation would be inherently perceived by them.

But he thought too much about it, and until everyone had checked it, nothing went wrong.

Just as everyone was about to enter the Life Divine Mountain, a Great Saint Ancestor-level powerhouse appeared.

"I am the guardian of the Life Divine Mountain, the Great Saint Ancestor - Yun, today you have the qualifications to enter the Life Divine Mountain, so you are qualified to know a secret of the Life Green Clan, that is, by your own strength, you can never become a Saint Ancestor, and you must use a treasure of the Life Divine Mountain to achieve a breakthrough!" Yun said.

"What, how is this possible?"

"It shouldn't be, if you have an escort team, you haven't entered the Life God Mountain, haven't you also broken through to the Holy Ancestor level?"

"I remember that there is a Saint Ancestor-level in our Longcheng who has submerged into the Life Divine Mountain!"

......

Just when many escort team levels were discussing, Yun explained: "Yes, it is true that there are people who have not entered the Life Divine Mountain, but they have broken through to the Saint Ancestor level, but at that time, they used the merits of their long years to exchange for a treasure from the Life Divine Mountain, and they were able to break through. If you don't use that treasure, no matter how evil your talent is, you won't be able to break through. This is the secret of our life green clan, and it must not be revealed easily, otherwise it will cause a huge mutiny. "

After listening to this, everyone nodded their heads in understanding.

After all, the guards who can enter the Life Divine Mountain are in the minority, and some of the guardian team level are not qualified to enter the Life Divine Mountain in their lifetime, if they know that they will not have the opportunity to enter the Saint Ancestor level in their lifetime, they will not be extremely angry, and even feel unfair.

At that time, the whole Life Green Clan will be in chaos.

Under the introduction of the Cloud Great Saint Ancestor, Ye Tian knew what the Life Green Clan needed to break through the shackles and be promoted to the Saint Ancestor level.

"The Sacred Stone of Life!"

This is a kind of treasure from the special head of the Divine Mountain of Life, a treasure that is slowly conceived under a special energy of the Divine Mountain of Life, which is very rare, so it cannot be supplied in large quantities.

For example, the hundreds of guards in front of him may not all be able to find the Life Sacred Stone, maybe only a dozen people can find the Life Sacred Stone, maybe not a single one.

Moreover, even if the Life Sacred Stone is found, it will only allow a Guardian Rank-level to have the qualification to go to the Saint Ancestor level, and the shackles in the dark will disappear, but it does not mean that it will definitely be able to become a Saint Ancestor level.

Historically, many of the Life Green Clan's Guardian Guards have obtained Life Sacred Stones, but in the end, they have not become Saint Ancestor level, which means that their qualifications are poor and their potential foundation is slightly weak, so they cannot become Saint Ancestor level.

In short, it takes great talent, a Life Sacred Stone, and a certain amount of luck to become a Holy Ancestor.

Even if it is so difficult to become a Holy Ancestor, the Life Green Clan has accumulated from generation to generation, and has also accumulated many Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses, Great Saint Ancestor-level powerhouses, and Old Ancestor-level powerhouses.

True Ancestors and Abyss Lords from the outside world could not enter this place, so the Life Green Clan was completely the true overlord of this world, and no one could shake their status.

According to the introduction of the Great Saint Ancestor of Yun, in addition to the Life Sacred Stone, the most precious thing in the Life Divine Mountain is the inheritance.

However, there are too few guards who can obtain the inheritance, and the specific situation will be known when you enter the Life Divine Mountain.

Other than that.

The life energy of the Life Divine Mountain is incomparably rich, and many treasures have been born in it, as long as they can be found, they belong to themselves.

Therefore, being able to enter the Sacred Mountain of Life, everyone can get a lot of harvest.

-------------

"Let's go inside!"

A Guardian Guard-level Life Green Clan person entered the Life Divine Mountain, and Ye Tian was naturally among them.

As soon as they entered the Life Divine Mountain, everyone felt the life energy far beyond the outside world, as well as a strong sense of oppression in the underworld, as if a supreme life was oppressing them.

These convoy level are here, and they can only fly at low altitudes, and their destructive power has been reduced countless times.

"How can this coercion seem to be a kind of coercion of a high-level life form that far surpasses itself?"

Ye Tian was curious.

But his body was already at the level of a half-step True Ancestor, and to a certain extent, it was not weaker than the True Ancestor, even the coercion of Dao Ancestor-level life could not make him feel this way.

It's weird!

But Ye Tian didn't delve into it, but continued to go deep into the Life Divine Mountain like other guard-level powerhouses.

After a while, a sacred mountain full of life appeared in the eyes of everyone.

One of the guards saw some of the magic elixirs, spirit plants, and fruits full of vitality and picked them one after another, after all, these are all good things!

Ye Tian also picked some, but he didn't pay too much attention to it.

He carefully sensed the attraction in the underworld, and the treasure that could allow him to copy the talent upgrade was still in the core area of the Life God Mountain.

The Mountain of Life is not a mountain, it is more like a mountain range, and there must be more treasures in the core area.

So, Ye Tian quickly flew to the core area.

After a while, Ye Tian saw a huge divine tree, this divine tree was even bigger than the divine tree where a tree city was located, and it was the largest divine tree that Ye Tian had ever seen now.

There is a huge passage under the sacred tree, and there is a stone tablet in front of the passage, on which is inscribed with the words of the Life Green Clan, introducing the situation about this passage.

"Inheritance Passage!"

Ye Tian suddenly understood.

This is the inheritance of the Life Green Clan, but the stone tablet also indicates that the inheritance channel is very dangerous, and those who lack strength should not accept the inheritance assessment, otherwise it is easy to fall.

"The other guards are probably still looking for the Life Sacred Stone, but the Life Sacred Stone is useless to me, I don't need it, it is better to enter this inheritance passage directly, maybe I can know more secrets!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

What's more, the treasure he sensed was inside the sacred tree.

In order to level up his copy talent, he must enter this Legacy Passage!
